## Summary

<!-- What problem does this solve, and how? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / API addition
- [ ] Documentation or spec only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run verify` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run verify:structure` passes (if dependencies or layout changed)
- [ ] Tests updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Specs / `docs/API_REFERENCE.md` updated if public behavior or exports changed
- [ ] `@intelpacket/core` still does **not** depend on `@intelpacket/pii`
